yacl3.config.spawningoverhaul:config.ena: List of dimension IDs where the immersive spawning system is active. Supports vanilla and modded dimensions (e.g., 'minecraft:overworld', 'twilightforest:twilight_forest').
yacl3.config.spawningoverhaul:config.bas: Base spawn rate multiplier applied everywhere (before cave/forest adjustments)
yacl3.config.spawningoverhaul:config.min: Minimum spawn rate in caves (at shallowest depth)
yacl3.config.spawningoverhaul:config.max: Maximum spawn rate in deep caves (at deepest depths)
yacl3.config.spawningoverhaul:config.min: Minimum spawn rate in forests (at lowest density)
yacl3.config.spawningoverhaul:config.max: Maximum spawn rate in dense forests (at highest density)
yacl3.config.spawningoverhaul:config.dan: Spawn rate multiplier in dangerous structures (strongholds, fortresses, etc.)
yacl3.config.spawningoverhaul:config.ena: Enable spawn modifications based on structures
yacl3.config.spawningoverhaul:config.den: Number of logs required in radius to count as dense forest
Radius (in blocks) to scan for logs when detecting dense forests
yacl3.config.spawningoverhaul:config.spi: If enabled, spiders can only spawn in caves
yacl3.config.spawningoverhaul:config.dis: If enabled, creepers cannot spawn near structures (prevents griefing)
